hooks.command: stdin=$(cat); case "$stdin" in *src/assets/i18n/*) node scripts/check-i18n-keys.mjs >&2 || exit 2;; esac
stdin=$(cat); case "$stdin" in *src/app/*.ts\"*) out=$(npx madge --circular --extensions ts src/app 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac
hooks.rewakeMessage: madge found a circular dependency in src/app — this shipped a blank-window crash before. Fix the cycle now:
